duration_policy: CLI-supported integer duration; seedance2.0_vip image2video supports 4-15s
command_contract_reference: sources/Dreamina_CLI执行契约_V1.2_命令预检与网页CLI差异补丁.md
narrative_function: CLI-legal 4-second SHOT-02 action highlight source intended to reveal a spherical rain shockwave from the clean locked first-clash keyframe, then edit down to strongest 1-2 seconds.
motion_policy: Preserve locked keyframe composition; hold impact, trigger spherical rain shockwave from central contact point, then perform a short pull-back reveal without changing scene or creating a second exchange.
camera_policy: Stable at impact, brief controlled shake at shockwave start, short pull-back reveal, then return to stability.

prior_attempt.target_miss_reason: multiple water spheres; central contact reads as splash; image mixes contact moment and post-impact expansion; not suitable as clean peak keyframe for frames2video
prior_attempt.lesson_learned: strong effect trigger words are useful, but should be used in video prompt with project anchors rather than overloading a static keyframe

allowed_next_action: Only submit after explicit user approval for exactly one Dreamina image2video task after command-contract preflight.
